title: Car Alloy Wheel Aerosol & Touch Up Paint Pen Black Paint Scratch Curb Repair Kit (Gloss Finish)
features: Choose your preferred finish from the options above. This kit includes an aerosol spray paint can and touch up pen to repair your alloy wheels.

We supply a high quality 2k self drying paint meaning that this is the most hassle free, cost effective way to repair your alloy wheels. With many years of experience and product testing, we believe this kit is the way forward for repairing alloy wheels.
This is compatible with all cars, SUV, MPV, trucks, lorry, tractor, caravan, campervan etc

Fully automated state of the art mixing system cuts out any human error making sure that the colour matches your vehicle perfectly - Over 500,000 different colour codes, formulations and codes available.

Why shop Tailored? Your vehicle deserves to have the new modern paint formulation to bring it back back to its former glory again! Our paint is suitable for all automotive body panels such as bonnet, plastic bumper, wing, door, grill, roof, bootlid and other chassis panels without forgetting alloy wheel and hubcaps!
description: From the brand Previous page We are Tailored Paint, a family run business from Northern Ireland. We started out in the automotive industry, delivering quality paints for cars, bikes, trucks and tractors locally and online. LOOK FOR THE BOWTIE! Our bowtie is our signature feature - look out for the bowtie! What makes our products unique? We quickly realised that our paint and our huge colour selection could lend themselves to many purposes. We've supplied paint for a wide variety of industries and home users, from car repairs to vehicle customisation, furniture upcycling and interior touch-ups. Why we love what we do? We are passionate about our customers and it really is them who make it all worthwhile. What colours can we mix? We can colour match pretty much anything! We have a huge database of colours as well as scanning technology. We take great satisfaction in matching and mixing the perfect shade for our customers. Next page
